entries.test: session inline spinner renders children through JSX slot
entries.diagnosis: API change: the TUI route now renders inline spinner labels through the `label()` memo instead of the old `props.label` expression, so the regression test was asserting an outdated implementation detail.
entries.fix_applied: Updated the spinner render assertion to expect `label()` instead of stale `props.label` in `tui-renderable.test.ts`.

entries.test: session route stringifies risky text payloads before rendering
entries.diagnosis: API change: the session route still stringifies risky text payloads through `str()`, but the helper was generalized from `function str(input: unknown)` to the generic `function str<T>(input: T)`, so the regression test was asserting an outdated signature string.
entries.fix_applied: Updated the render-safety assertion to expect the generic `str<T>` helper signature in `tui-renderable.test.ts`.
